scripts.generate: npx openapi-typescript-codegen --input spec/bluebubbles.openapi.yaml --output ./src --client fetch --useOptions --name BlueBubblesClient --postfixServices Service && sed -i '' '/services\//d' src/index.ts && sed -i '' '/models\//d' src/index.ts && rmdir src/models 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.build: npm run spec:download && sed -i '' 's/{{scheme}}:\/\/{{host}}/http:\/\/localhost/g' spec/bluebubbles.postman.json && sed -i '' 's/{{host}}/localhost/g' spec/bluebubbles.postman.json && sed -i '' 's/{{scheme}}/http/g' spec/bluebubbles.postman.json && sed -i '' 's/{{password}}/password/g' spec/bluebubbles.postman.json && sed -i '' 's/"localhost\//"http:\/\/localhost\//g' spec/bluebubbles.postman.json && npm run spec:convert && python3 scripts/fix_spec.py && npm run generate && tsc
